result:
Here are the specific files and functions involved in CRM loyalty points redemption:

---

### Routes
- **`app/Http/routes.loyalpoints.php:37`** — `POST /{chainID}/redeemLoyaltyPoints` → `MQLoyalController@redeemLoyaltyPoints`

### Controllers
- **`app/Http/Controllers/MQLoyalController.php:380`** — `redeemLoyaltyPoints(Request $request)` — validates input, delegates to `MQLoyal::redeemLoyaltyPoints()`
- **`app/Http/Controllers/OrderController.php`** — reads `redeemAmount`/`redeemPoints` from `crmSettings` during order creation to calculate redeemable value
- **`app/Http/Controllers/v2/OrderController.php`** — same pattern (v2)

### Models / Service Classes
- **`app/MQLoyal.php:294`** — `MQLoyal::redeemLoyaltyPoints($dataArray, $chainID)` — calls external MQLoyal API with `REDEEM_LOYALTY_POINTS_ACTION`  (class `MQLoyal` at line 9)
- **`app/Mobiquest.php:1572`** — `Mobiquest::redeemLoyaltyPoints($dataArray, $chainID)` — alternate CRM provider, same action via `REDEEM_LOYALTY_POINTS_ACTION` (class `Mobiquest` at line 13)
- **`app/Order.php`** — core order processing:
  - **Line ~4878** — sets `loyaltyPointsRedeemed` on `orderSummary`
  - **Line ~11015** — updates customer `pointsRedeemed` balance
  - **Line ~11080–11100** — writes loyalty point ledger entry with `transactionType = 'REDEEMED'`
  - **Line ~15072–15257** — recalculates redeemed points on order edit/void using `purchaseAmount`/`redeemAmount` from `crmSettings`

### CRM Setup & Configuration
- **`app/chainSetup.php:3185`** — CRM loyalty config save: `redeemPoints`, `redeemAmount`, `minimumOrderValueToRedeemPoints`, `sendOtpToRedeemPoints`, `loyaltyRedeemType` (ABSOLUTE vs percentage), `maximumPointsRedeemedPerOrder`
- **`app/Store.php:229`** — builds blank CRM defaults including `redeemPoints = 0`, `loyaltyRedeemType = "ABSOLUTE"`
- **`app/Customers.php:262`** — reads `redeemAmount`/`redeemPoints` from `crmSettings` for customer-facing point valuation

### Schema
- **`cloud_schema/globals.sql:4852`** — `crmSettings` table: `loyaltyID`, `purchaseAmount`, `redeemAmount`, `redeemPoints`, `loyaltyMode` (DISCOUNT/PAYMENT)
- **`cloud_schema/store.sql`** / **`cloud_schema/chain.sql`** — `orderSummary` tables contain `loyaltyPointsRedeemed`, `loyaltyPointsCollected`, `loyaltyID`

### Reports (read-only consumption)
- **`app/thirdParty.php`** — multiple report queries selecting `loyaltyPointsRedeemed`
- **`app/v3/reports/OrderReport.php`**, **`app/v3/reports/SalesReport.php`**, **`app/v3/reports/WrappedReport.php`** — v3 report references
- **`app/report.php`**, **`app/v2/report.php`** — legacy reports

### Helpers
- **`app/helpers.php:2564`** — helper utility referencing redeem logic
- **`app/chainSetup.php:15125`** — `getOrderValues` for loyalty WhatsApp/SMS receipts (reads `loyaltyPointsRedeemed`)
